The establishment has built its reputation over five decades around serving traditional Portuguese cod preparations, earning its name ("King of Cod"). Visitors to Lisbon interested in authentic Portuguese cuisine and classic seafood dishes should consider this long-standing restaurant as a reliable destination for experiencing traditional bacalhau (cod) preparations.
